parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { correlationId: $json.correlationId, workflowName: $json.workflowName ?? 'unknown', executionId: $json.executionId, nodeName: $json.nodeName, operation: $json.operation, errorType: $json.errorType, errorCode: $json.errorCode, statusCode: $json.statusCode, retryable: $json.retryable, attempt: $json.attempt ?? 1, message: $json.message, payload: $json.payload } }}

parameters.subject: =[LeadOps] Automation failure: {{ $json.workflowName }} ({{ $json.errorType }})

nodes.name: Send Email (Mailpit)
nodes.notes: Select 'Mailpit SMTP' credential. Alert only on definitive failures.
